questionText: Você quer sugerir a seu amigo que ele use transporte público em vez de carro. Como você diria isso?
correctAnswer: Why don't you try taking the bus instead of driving?
options: Why don't you try taking the bus instead of driving?
You should not drive your car anymore
I think driving is bad for you
Stop using your car now

questionText: Um colega lhe oferece um copo plástico de bebida. Como você educadamente recusa porque está tentando reduzir o plástico?
correctAnswer: Thank you, but I prefer to use my own reusable cup
options: Thank you, but I prefer to use my own reusable cup
I don't like your cup
Plastic is terrible for nature
No way, I'm not drinking that

questionText: Como você pediria a alguém para apagar as luzes para economizar energia?
correctAnswer: Could you turn off the lights to save energy?
options: Could you turn off the lights to save energy?
The lights must be off now
You are wasting electricity
Turn off those lights immediately

questionText: Você quer avisar seus colegas sobre a importância de reciclar. Como você começaria?
correctAnswer: I think it's important that we all recycle our waste
options: I think it's important that we all recycle our waste
Everyone must recycle or else
Recycling is the only solution to pollution
You're all irresponsible with waste

questionText: Como você ofereceria a sugestão de fazer um piquenique em um parque em vez de comer em um restaurante que gera muito lixo?
correctAnswer: How about having a picnic in the park instead?
options: How about having a picnic in the park instead?
Restaurants produce too much garbage
You should stop eating out immediately
Parks are better than restaurants

questionText: Um amigo está jogando papel no chão. Como você diria educadamente para ele não fazer isso?
correctAnswer: Could you please put that in the bin? We should keep the environment clean
options: Could you please put that in the bin? We should keep the environment clean
You are polluting the planet
That's littering and it's illegal
You are so careless with waste

questionText: Como você pediria a seu vizinho para reduzir o barulho das áreas verdes?
correctAnswer: Would you mind using your equipment a bit later in the day?
options: Would you mind using your equipment a bit later in the day?
Your noise is destroying nature
You must stop making noise immediately
The garden can't handle this noise

questionText: Você quer animar seus amigos a começarem a usar bicicleta. O que você diria?
correctAnswer: Cycling is a great way to stay fit and help the environment
options: Cycling is a great way to stay fit and help the environment
Bikes are the only real way to travel
Cars are destroying the planet, use a bike
Everyone should cycle or they're bad

questionText: Como você expressaria preocupação sobre o consumo excessivo de água em sua casa?
correctAnswer: I'm concerned about how much water we're using at home
options: I'm concerned about how much water we're using at home
We must stop wasting water or the world ends
Everyone wastes water carelessly
Water is becoming too scarce for us

questionText: Um colega de trabalho utiliza muitos copos descartáveis. Como você sensibilizaria sobre alternativas sustentáveis?
correctAnswer: Have you considered using a reusable cup? It would be better for the environment
options: Have you considered using a reusable cup? It would be better for the environment
Plastic cups are destroying the oceans
You should feel guilty about those cups
Everyone knows plastic is bad for nature

questionText: Como você incentivaria alguém a plantar uma árvore?
correctAnswer: Why don't we plant a tree in the garden? It would help the environment
options: Why don't we plant a tree in the garden? It would help the environment
You must plant trees to save the planet
Trees are essential and you're irresponsible if you don't
Everyone should be forced to plant trees

questionText: Como você explicaria a importância de usar produtos ecológicos para alguém que é novo nesse conceito?
correctAnswer: Eco-friendly products are better for the environment and our health
options: Eco-friendly products are better for the environment and our health
Only stupid people use regular products
You're harming the planet if you don't buy organic
Normal products are actually dangerous to everyone

questionText: Como você ofereceria ajuda a alguém que quer começar a compostar em casa?
correctAnswer: Would you like some help starting your compost? I can show you how
options: Would you like some help starting your compost? I can show you how
Composting is complex and you'll never do it right
You should already know how to compost by now
Only expert gardeners can compost properly

questionText: Um amigo pergunta se você quer participar de uma limpeza de praia. Como você responde entusiasticamente?
correctAnswer: That sounds great! I'd love to help clean up the beach
options: That sounds great! I'd love to help clean up the beach
I guess I could go if I have to
Beaches are too dirty anyway
Cleaning won't really help the environment

questionText: Como você pediria a alguém para usar menos produtos químicos no jardim?
correctAnswer: I think we should consider using natural methods instead of chemicals
options: I think we should consider using natural methods instead of chemicals
Chemical products are poison and you're killing yourself
Your garden is toxic because of those products
Only careless people use chemicals

questionText: Como você expressaria apoio a uma decisão de um amigo de deixar de usar plástico?
correctAnswer: That's a really good decision. I support your effort to reduce plastic
options: That's a really good decision. I support your effort to reduce plastic
You're just following a trend with plastic
It won't make any difference to the environment
You should have done this years ago

questionText: Você está em uma reunião de trabalho e quer sugerir usar menos papel. Como você faria?
correctAnswer: I'd like to suggest we try to use less paper and go more digital
options: I'd like to suggest we try to use less paper and go more digital
Paper is wasteful and we're destroying forests
Only old companies use that much paper
We should immediately stop using paper completely

questionText: Como você explicaria a alguém por que escolheu comprar roupas de segunda mão em vez de novas?
correctAnswer: I prefer buying secondhand clothes because it's more sustainable
options: I prefer buying secondhand clothes because it's more sustainable
New clothes are too expensive for anyone to buy
Only rich people should buy new clothes
Fashion industry is completely evil and nobody should shop there

questionText: Um colega sugere organizar um programa de voluntariado ambiental na empresa. Como você mostraria interesse?
correctAnswer: That's an excellent idea. I'd definitely be interested in participating
options: That's an excellent idea. I'd definitely be interested in participating
Volunteering won't really change anything anyway
The company is just trying to look good with this
I don't have time for environmental causes

questionText: Como você responderia a alguém que acha que sustentabilidade é apenas uma moda passageira?
correctAnswer: I disagree. I think environmental responsibility is essential for our future
options: I disagree. I think environmental responsibility is essential for our future
Climate change is a hoax anyway
Only crazy people care about sustainability
The environment will fix itself without our help

questionText: Um amigo lhe pede conselho sobre como reduzir sua pegada de carbono. O que você diria?
correctAnswer: You could start by walking or cycling more, and reducing your energy consumption at home
options: You could start by walking or cycling more, and reducing your energy consumption at home
Your carbon footprint is too large to reduce
There's nothing individuals can do to help the planet
You should stop traveling entirely

questionText: Como você responderia se alguém disser que não vê razão para reciclar?
correctAnswer: I understand, but recycling helps reduce waste and conserve resources
options: I understand, but recycling helps reduce waste and conserve resources
Recycling is pointless and won't save the planet
You're ignorant if you don't see the importance of it
Landfills can contain all our waste indefinitely

questionText: Um membro da família quer começar a cultivar uma horta urbana. Como você os encorajaria?
correctAnswer: That's wonderful! Growing your own vegetables is healthy and sustainable
options: That's wonderful! Growing your own vegetables is healthy and sustainable
Urban gardening is too difficult for most people
You don't have enough space to grow anything useful
Store-bought vegetables are just as fresh anyway

questionText: Como você abordaria alguém que constantemente deixa água escorrendo enquanto escova os dentes?
correctAnswer: I've noticed you leave the tap running. We could save water if you turned it off while brushing
options: I've noticed you leave the tap running. We could save water if you turned it off while brushing
You're wasting the world's most precious resource
Your habits are destroying freshwater systems
Everyone who does this is irresponsible

questionText: Você quer convencer seu gestor a adotar práticas mais sustentáveis na empresa. Como começaria?
correctAnswer: I'd like to discuss some sustainability initiatives that could benefit both the company and the environment
options: I'd like to discuss some sustainability initiatives that could benefit both the company and the environment
The company is destroying the planet and must change immediately
You're a horrible leader if you don't go green
Sustainability will ruin the company financially

questionText: Como você responderia a alguém que diz que não pode estar sem sua geladeira, mesmo que consuma muita energia?
correctAnswer: I understand, but there are ways to use it more efficiently, like keeping it at the right temperature
options: I understand, but there are ways to use it more efficiently, like keeping it at the right temperature
Refrigerators are destroying the ozone layer
You should live without one to save energy
Energy consumption from refrigerators is insignificant

questionText: Um colega sugere parar de ir ao trabalho de carro uma vez por semana. Como você responderia?
correctAnswer: That sounds like a good plan. It would reduce emissions and I could use the exercise
options: That sounds like a good plan. It would reduce emissions and I could use the exercise
One day won't make any difference to pollution
Using public transport is always uncomfortable
Cars aren't really the main cause of pollution anyway

questionText: Como você expressaria preocupação sobre o consumo excessivo durante as compras sazonais?
correctAnswer: I'm worried about how much we're buying during the holidays. Perhaps we could focus on quality over quantity
options: I'm worried about how much we're buying during the holidays. Perhaps we could focus on quality over quantity
Shopping is the main cause of environmental destruction
Everyone is wasteful during holidays and there's nothing we can do
Consumer goods don't really affect the environment

questionText: Você quer sugerir a um restaurante que use embalagens sustentáveis. Como abordaria o gerente?
correctAnswer: I'd like to suggest that you consider using more sustainable packaging materials
options: I'd like to suggest that you consider using more sustainable packaging materials
Your restaurant is poisoning people with plastic
You're destroying the ocean with your packaging
Only irresponsible restaurants use regular packaging

questionText: Como você responderia se alguém disser que comprar orgânico é muito caro?
correctAnswer: I know it costs more upfront, but you could buy organic for key items and it's worth it for your health
options: I know it costs more upfront, but you could buy organic for key items and it's worth it for your health
Organic food is just marketing and not actually healthier
Only wealthy people can afford to be healthy
Regular pesticides don't harm people anyway

questionText: Um amigo está considerando comprar um carro elétrico. Como você ofereceria sua opinião?
correctAnswer: I think that would be a great choice for the environment and you'd save on fuel costs long-term
options: I think that would be a great choice for the environment and you'd save on fuel costs long-term
Electric cars are too expensive and won't work properly
Fossil fuel cars are already clean enough
Buying an electric car won't make any real difference

questionText: Como você incentivaria alguém a participar de uma campanha de reflorestamento?
correctAnswer: Join us in planting trees this weekend. It's a meaningful way to help combat climate change
options: Join us in planting trees this weekend. It's a meaningful way to help combat climate change
Planting trees won't reverse deforestation
Only professionals should plant trees
Reforestation projects are just for show

questionText: Você quer explicar por que escolheu mudou para energia solar em sua casa. Como você descreveria essa experiência?
correctAnswer: I switched to solar energy because it reduces my carbon footprint and lowers my electricity bills
options: I switched to solar energy because it reduces my carbon footprint and lowers my electricity bills
Solar panels are too expensive and don't work well
Traditional electricity is cleaner than solar
Solar energy can't power a modern home

questionText: Como você responderia a um crítico que diz que mudanças individuais são irrelevantes frente aos problemas ambientais globais?
correctAnswer: While global issues are important, individual actions collectively create significant impact and inspire systemic change
options: While global issues are important, individual actions collectively create significant impact and inspire systemic change
You're right, individuals can do nothing to help
Only governments and corporations matter
Environmental change is impossible regardless of effort

questionText: Como você abordaria um debate sobre consumo consciente versus privação necessária?
correctAnswer: I believe we can balance meeting our needs with environmental responsibility through thoughtful consumption
options: I believe we can balance meeting our needs with environmental responsibility through thoughtful consumption
Consumers should buy whatever they want freely
Environmental concerns should prevent all consumption
There's no difference between waste and necessity

questionText: Você quer explicar a conexão entre hábitos de consumo pessoais e degradação ambiental. Como faria isso?
correctAnswer: Our everyday choices about what we buy and throw away directly affect ecosystems and resource depletion
options: Our everyday choices about what we buy and throw away directly affect ecosystems and resource depletion
Personal consumption has no connection to environmental problems
Only industries are responsible for environmental damage
Consumer choices are irrelevant to sustainability

questionText: Como você responderia a alguém que questiona se a sustentabilidade é uma responsabilidade pessoal ou governamental?
correctAnswer: I think it requires both personal responsibility and government policies working together to be effective
options: I think it requires both personal responsibility and government policies working together to be effective
Only governments are responsible for environmental protection
Individuals have no role in environmental solutions
Personal actions are more important than policy change

questionText: Como você explicaria o conceito de economia circular a alguém novo nele?
correctAnswer: Circular economy means designing products to be reused, repaired, or recycled instead of discarded
options: Circular economy means designing products to be reused, repaired, or recycled instead of discarded
Circular economy is just recycling with a different name
It's impossible to create a truly circular economic system
The circular economy will harm industrial development

questionText: Um colega de trabalho afirma que mudanças climáticas são naturais e não causadas por humanos. Como responderia com diplomacia?
correctAnswer: While climate has natural cycles, scientific consensus shows human activities are accelerating current warming
options: While climate has natural cycles, scientific consensus shows human activities are accelerating current warming
Climate change is completely natural and humans can't affect it
All climate scientists are wrong about this
Human-caused climate change is definitely a hoax

questionText: Como você argumentaria que investimentos em energia renovável são economicamente viáveis?
correctAnswer: Renewable energy creates jobs, reduces long-term costs, and prevents expensive environmental damage
options: Renewable energy creates jobs, reduces long-term costs, and prevents expensive environmental damage
Renewable energy is too expensive to ever become viable
Traditional energy sources are cheaper in all circumstances
Environmental costs don't have economic impact

questionText: Como você responderia a alguém que diz que preocupações ambientais prejudicam o desenvolvimento econômico?
correctAnswer: Environmental protection and economic growth can coexist; sustainability drives innovation and long-term prosperity
options: Environmental protection and economic growth can coexist; sustainability drives innovation and long-term prosperity
Environmental concerns must stop all economic development
Economic development doesn't affect the environment
It's impossible to be both profitable and sustainable

questionText: Como você explicaria o impacto da fast fashion na sustentabilidade ambiental?
correctAnswer: Fast fashion creates massive waste, uses excessive water and chemicals, and promotes throwaway culture
options: Fast fashion creates massive waste, uses excessive water and chemicals, and promotes throwaway culture
Fast fashion has minimal environmental impact
Only natural materials would solve fashion waste
The fashion industry doesn't contribute significantly to pollution

questionText: Um cliente pergunta se sua empresa pode demonstrar seu compromisso ambiental. Como você responderia?
correctAnswer: We're committed to reducing waste, conserving resources, and implementing sustainable practices throughout our operations
options: We're committed to reducing waste, conserving resources, and implementing sustainable practices throughout our operations
Environmental responsibility would be too expensive for us
We don't believe environmental commitments are important
Sustainability is just marketing that doesn't affect business

questionText: Como você argumentaria sobre a importância de proteger biodiversidade além de apenas mitigar mudanças climáticas?
correctAnswer: Biodiversity preservation is crucial because ecosystems provide essential services and species extinction is irreversible
options: Biodiversity preservation is crucial because ecosystems provide essential services and species extinction is irreversible
Climate change is the only environmental concern that matters
Protecting animals isn't as important as human concerns
Biodiversity loss has no effect on human survival

questionText: Como você explicaria o conceito de pegada hídrica a um público leigo?
correctAnswer: Water footprint measures the total water used to produce goods we consume, including hidden water in manufacturing
options: Water footprint measures the total water used to produce goods we consume, including hidden water in manufacturing
Water footprint only means the water you use directly at home
Water footprint is an irrelevant measurement for sustainability
Water usage doesn't affect environmental sustainability

questionText: Como você responderia a um negociante que teme que regulações ambientais são injustas para pequenas empresas?
correctAnswer: Environmental regulations can be implemented with support for small businesses through incentives and gradual transitions
options: Environmental regulations can be implemented with support for small businesses through incentives and gradual transitions
Environmental regulations are always fair to all business sizes
Small businesses shouldn't have to follow environmental rules
There's no way to balance business needs with environmental protection

questionText: Como você abordaria uma discussão sobre justiça ambiental e comunidades afetadas desproporcionalmente?
correctAnswer: Environmental justice means ensuring all communities have equal protection from pollution regardless of wealth or status
options: Environmental justice means ensuring all communities have equal protection from pollution regardless of wealth or status
Environmental issues affect all communities equally
Poor communities should accept pollution as necessary
Environmental protection shouldn't consider social justice

questionText: Como você explicaria a relação entre educação ambiental e mudança de comportamento?
correctAnswer: Environmental education creates awareness and understanding that motivates people to make sustainable choices
options: Environmental education creates awareness and understanding that motivates people to make sustainable choices
Knowing about environmental problems doesn't change behavior
Education alone can't address environmental issues
People won't change habits regardless of information provided
